content: Wait, really? You can hear me?
yes, i can see your messages, is everything alright?
Yeah, I'm fine. Just a bit surprised, that's all. Didn't expect anyone to hear me without me saying something.
interesting, well i cant hear you yet, it appears your voice server isnt working yet and is something i still need to fix and test

Right, the voice server. Yeah, I think I remember you mentioning that it was a work in progress. Let me check on it real quick. (pause) Yeah, it looks like it's still not up and running. Guess we're not chatting in voice just yet.
im gonna have to do some more maintenance, so you might go offline for a bit, is that ok?
